center.name: 聖胡安河 (哥倫比亞)
center.summary: 聖胡安河 (哥倫比亞)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Greyish piculet，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in northwestern Colombia on the western slope of the Western Andes between Antioquia Department and the upper reaches of the Rio San Juan

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in northwestern Colombia on the western slope of the Western Andes between Antioquia Department and the upper reaches of the Rio San Juan
